name: Parasol Planter
desc: The remains of a Parasol that have been relentlessly butchered in the name of fashion. Believed to migrate between the regions of the Voidsea, the sight of a Parasol is more than enough to make many lose their lunch. It's thought that they act as a form of cross-pollinator for various creatures that make their way from the Depths to Lumen, exchanging the traits and properties between them and dismantling ecosystems by injecting them into a competing niche.
